testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Validation Broken: Expected the login to be blocked, but the application mistakenly redirected to the dashboard screen. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Validation Broken: Expected the login to be blocked, but the application mistakenly redirected to the dashboard screen. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at StepDef.HRMSSteps.user_should_see_the_validation_status_as(HRMSSteps.java:54) at ✽.user should see the validation status as "Fail"(file:///C:/Users/NI20696194/eclipse-workspace/CucumberBDDFrameworkHooks/src/test/resources/feature/HRMS.feature:7)
